creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145683
patch for updating port

- Update to ver 0.20.0.1
- Add new BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS 
   (see PRs 192586, 192473).
- Add CONFLICTS with the retired port 
   security/p5-openxpki-client-html-mason (see PR 192590).

The proposed version of the port 
has passed tests on FreeBSD-10.0 (amd64) with:

- poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o security/p5-openxpki > ox-poudriere.log
(log attached herewith)
